scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:push: npm --prefix backend exec prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: concurrently -n DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND -c yellow,blue,green "npm run db:start" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
